g.text: Tool is a bash OS command that overlays a standard
OS command to provide relevant information about the
workspace. It is a wrapper script for kbox command that
calls k8shelld to perform relevant action.
The state manager persists the workspace state by storing
the upperdir as a new image layer. This allows the workspace
to resume from its previous state by starting a new instance
